content: اِلواحِد لاَزِم يِبُصّ يِمين و شِمال، قَبل ما يِعدّي اِلشارِع

transcriptions.arabizi: ilwaehid laezim yibuss yimeen w shimael, 'ablama yiAddiilshaariA

relationships: eng:a person must look left AND right before crossing the road
